typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Project_id as string,
		function_code as string,
		source_name as string,
		sub_source_name as string,
		class_name as string,
		sub_class_name as string,
		unit_of_measure as string,
		pim_code as string,
		roc_code as string,
		Phase_Code as string,
		WorkArea_Code as string,
		WorkUnit_Code as string,
		ScheduleResource_Code as string,
		cwp_code as string,
		Activity as string,
		iwp_Code as string,
		DateWorked as string,
		EmployeeID as string,
		coa_value as string,
		Spent_Hours as double
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/Sitepro/SiteproTimesheet/Sitepro_Timesheet.csv']) ~> sourceSiteproTimesheetStage
sourceSiteproTimesheetStage derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/SiteproTimesheet/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'Sitepro_Timesheet_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkTimesheetSiteproRaw
